en: The following is a conversation with Elon Musk, DJ Sa,
Matthew McDougal, Bliss Chapman, and Noland Arbaugh
about Neuralink and the future of humanity.
Elon, DJ, Matthew, and Bliss are, of course, part of the amazing Neuralink team,
and Noland is the first human to have a Neuralink device implanted in his brain.
I speak with each of them individually, so use timestamps to jump around,
or, as I recommend, go hardcore and listen to the whole thing.
This is the longest podcast I've ever done.
It's a fascinating, super technical, and wide-ranging conversation,
and I loved every minute of it.
And now, dear friends, here's Elon Musk,
his fifth time on this The Lex Friedman Podcast.
Well, I'm so over-caffeinated right now. Do you want some caffeine?
I mean, sure. There's a nitro drink.
